puzzle.hint: This verse is a powerful rebuttal to those who doubt the resurrection, highlighting Allah's ability to recreate even the most intricate and unique parts of a person.
puzzle.arabic: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ
puzzle.verseEn: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.
